summary: Comprehensive testing of Ops Management App completed. All 17 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend features verified. Fixed critical bug: SelectItem empty value error in Inventory.js. All role-based permissions working correctly.

minor.issue: Old deployments still have 'deployment_manager' (singular) instead of 'deployment_managers' (array) - backward compatibility handled in frontend

critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: SelectItem value="" error in Inventory.js - changed to value="none" with proper conversion
Admin Inventory CRUD fully working: Add/Edit/Delete items
Admin Panel correctly shows only Users, BnBs, Kits tabs (no Items, no Deployments)
Deployments page has no 'Add BnB' button - BnBs managed via Admin Panel only
Multiple deployment managers per deployment working correctly
Deployment managers can VIEW inventory but NOT edit/delete
Deployment managers only see their assigned deployments
context_for_next_testing_agent: All core features tested and working. Fixed SelectItem empty value bug in Inventory.js. Backend has backward compatibility for old deployments with deployment_manager (singular) field.
passed_tests: Backend: Health endpoint returns status ok
Backend: Admin login with Admin/admin123
Backend: Admin can create item
Backend: Admin can update item via PUT /api/items/{item_name}
Backend: Admin can delete item
Backend: Item updates persist in database
Backend: Manager can login with TestManager1/test123
Backend: Manager can VIEW items
Backend: Manager CANNOT create items (403 Admin only)
Backend: Manager CANNOT update items (403 Admin only)
Backend: Manager CANNOT delete items (403 Admin only)
Backend: Manager only sees assigned deployments
Backend: Create deployment with multiple managers
Backend: PUT endpoint returns 404 for non-existent item
Frontend: Admin sees Add Item button on Inventory page
Frontend: Admin can add new item via dialog
Frontend: Admin can edit item status (active -> damaged)
Frontend: Admin can delete item
Frontend: Admin Panel shows only Users, BnBs, Kits tabs
Frontend: Admin Panel does NOT show Items tab
Frontend: Admin Panel does NOT show Deployments tab
Frontend: Deployments page has NO 'Add BnB' button
Frontend: Deployments page supports multiple manager selection
Frontend: Manager can VIEW inventory items
Frontend: Manager does NOT see Add Item button
Frontend: Manager does NOT see Edit buttons
Frontend: Manager does NOT see Delete buttons
Frontend: Manager sees 'Your assignments' subtitle (not 'Plan & assign')
Frontend: Manager does NOT see Add deployment button
features_verified: Admin full CRUD on Inventory page
Admin Panel limited to Users, BnBs, Kits
Deployments page is planning-only (no BnB management)
Strict role permissions: Admin has full control, Manager view-only on inventory

bug_fixed.issue: SelectItem with value="" caused runtime error 'A <Select.Item /> must have a value prop that is not an empty string'
bug_fixed.fix: Changed value="" to value="none" and added conversion logic to handle 'none' as empty string
